creator: herbert@gojira.at
text:
I often see this error updating ports with portmaster:

# pwd
/root
# portmaster security/ca_root_nss
[...]
pkg: sqlite error while executing sqlite open in file pkgdb.c:1126: unable to open database file

If I remove pkg-message from SUB_FILES (security/ca_root_nss/Makefile) the error is gone. After more testing I think the error does not appear on 12.0-CURRENT (pkg) and 11-RELEASE/STABLE (pkg-devel).
